title: Algerian Citrus Chicken
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish that combines the bright flavors of citrus and the crunch of almonds, inspired by Algerian cuisine.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, orange juice, lemon juice, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the chicken in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped almonds to the skillet and cook until lightly toasted, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced chicken with toasted almonds and garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
